attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
FETCHAMT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FETCHAMT.TS_FETCH_AMT,
COAAMT.TS_COA_AMT,
FETCHAMT.TS_FETCH_AMT+COAAMT.TS_COA_AMT NET_TS_FETCH_COA_AMT ,
SWAMT.SSC_WARRANTY_CREDIT_AMT * -1 AS SSC_WARRANTY_CREDIT_AMT,
TWAMT.TAC_WARRANTY_CREDIT_AMT* -1 AS TAC_WARRANTY_CREDIT_AMT
FROM
(
SELECT 
TS_DCD.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,SUM(TS_DCD.TS_FETCH_AMT) AS TS_FETCH_AMT
FROM 
(
SELECT
RFM.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
TRIM(SUM(ZEROIFNULL(NJEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT ) -ZEROIFNULL(NJEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT))) TS_FETCH_AMT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID      RFM
ON (NJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  =RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT )
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE
ON  (NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT = NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
AND NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NJE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS_TV NSOB
ON (NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND NSOB.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01')
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY NPLH
ON ( NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NPLH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
AND NJEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD = NPLH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE
AND NPLH.NODE_LEVEL05_NAME ='TSS (SUPPORT)')
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY NFAH
ON (NJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = NFAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
AND NFAH.LEVEL03_ACCT_GROUP_ID ='EXPENSE'
AND NFAH.LEVEL04_ACCT_GROUP_ID <> 'NON EXPENSE SSOT OTHER')
WHERE (  NJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD  IN ( 'MO' , 'MC' )
OR ( NJEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD = 'UO'
AND NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_NAME =  'REVALUATION'
AND NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME = 'REVALUATION'
AND NSOB.PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG ='Y' ) )
GROUP BY RFM.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME

UNION ALL /* DCD Elimination inclusion*/
SELECT RFM.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME           
,TRIM(SUM(ZEROIFNULL(EXM.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT)-ZEROIFNULL(EXM.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT))) TS_FETCH_AMT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_EXPENSE_MEASURE EXM
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID  RFM ON (EXM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  =RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
 AND  EXM.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD IN ('MO','MC')) AND EXM.TRANSACTION_TYPE='FA_ELIM'  
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS_TV SOB
ON  (EXM.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = SOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND SOB.END_TV_DT = '3500-01-01')
INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY PLH
ON  (EXM.BK_COMPANY_CODE=PLH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
AND EXM.DD_BK_DEPT_CD = PLH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE
AND PLH.NODE_LEVEL05_NAME ='TSS (SUPPORT)')
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.R_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_HIERARCHY FAH
ON  (EXM.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = FAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
AND FAH.LEVEL03_ACCT_GROUP_ID='Expense'  AND FAH.LEVEL04_ACCT_GROUP_ID <> 'Non Expense SSOT Other')
GROUP BY RFM.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME           /* DCD Elimination inclusion*/
 ) TS_DCD GROUP BY 1
)  FETCHAMT
INNER JOIN
(
SELECT FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME, CAST(SUM(USD_UNIT_NAT_NET) AS DECIMAL(26,
7)) TS_COA_AMT
FROM
(
SELECT
BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD                                                                                                                                ,
FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,BK_COMPANY_CODE
,DD_BK_DEPT_CD
,SUM(USD_NAT_NET)/SUM(NO_OF_TIMES) USD_UNIT_NAT_NET
FROM
(
SELECT
PARM.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD
,BK_COMPANY_CODE
,DD_BK_DEPT_CD
,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(USD_REV_NET)) USD_REV_NET
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(USD_NAT_NET)) USD_NAT_NET
,COUNT(*) NO_OF_TIMES
FROM
(
SELECT
JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,JEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD
,JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,FMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,SUM((ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT) - ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT)) *-1) USD_REV_NET
,SUM((ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT) - ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT)) ) USD_NAT_NET
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE JEL
,$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID    FMY
WHERE JEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT=FMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD IN ('MO','MC')
AND JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD BETWEEN '50000' AND '59999'

GROUP BY
JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,JEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD
,JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,FMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME

UNION
ALL

SELECT
BK_COMPANY_CD  AS BK_COMPANY_CODE   ,
BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD ,
BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   ,
NFM.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
/*NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,*/
SUM((CONSOLIDATED_BALANCE_USD_AMT  ) * -1 )AS USD_REV_NET,
SUM(CONSOLIDATED_BALANCE_USD_AMT )AS USD_NAT_NET
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_HFM_ACCOUNT_BALANCE NHB,
/*$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  NFM*/
$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID NFM

WHERE NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=NHB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT*100+NHB. BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT

AND    NHB.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ='N'

AND NHB.BK_ROLLUP_CATEGORY_CD ='USD TOTAL'
AND NHB.DEPARTMENT_TYPE<> 'FINANCIAL DEPARTMENT'

AND NHB.BK_COMPANY_CD = '010'

AND BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  BETWEEN '50000' AND '59999'

AND NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT>=201302

GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
)C
,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_PARAMETER PARM

WHERE PARM.INCLUSION_FLG='Y'

AND PARM.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD='SUPPTMATLCOSTS'

AND DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD BETWEEN PARM.BK_ACCOUNT_RANGE_LOW_CD AND PARM.BK_ACCOUNT_RANGE_HIGH_CD

AND DD_BK_DEPT_CD  BETWEEN PARM.BK_DEPARTMENT_RANGE_LOW_CD AND PARM.BK_DEPARTMENT_RANGE_HIGH_CD

AND BK_COMPANY_CODE BETWEEN PARM.BK_COMPANY_RANGE_LOW_CD AND PARM.BK_COMPANY_RANGE_HIGH_CD

GROUP BY
PARM.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD
,BK_COMPANY_CODE
,DD_BK_DEPT_CD
,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME

UNION
ALL

SELECT
PARM.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD
,BK_COMPANY_CODE
,DD_BK_DEPT_CD
,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(USD_REV_NET)) USD_REV_NET
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(USD_NAT_NET)) USD_NAT_NET
,COUNT(*) NO_OF_TIMES

FROM
(
SELECT
JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,JEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD
,JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,FMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,SUM((ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT) - ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT)) ) USD_REV_NET
,SUM((ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT) - ZEROIFNULL(JEL.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT)) ) USD_NAT_NET
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE JEL
,$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID   FMY

WHERE JEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT=FMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT

AND JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD IN ('MO','MC')

AND JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD BETWEEN '50000' AND '59999'

GROUP BY
JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,JEL.DD_BK_DEPT_CD
,JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,FMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME

UNION
ALL

SELECT
BK_COMPANY_CD  AS BK_COMPANY_CODE   ,
BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD ,
BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   ,
NFM.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
/*  NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,*/
SUM((CONSOLIDATED_BALANCE_USD_AMT  ) )AS USD_REV_NET,
SUM(CONSOLIDATED_BALANCE_USD_AMT )AS USD_NAT_NET
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_HFM_ACCOUNT_BALANCE NHB,
/*$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  NFM*/
$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID NFM

WHERE NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=NHB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT*100+NHB. BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT

AND    NHB.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ='N'

AND NHB.BK_ROLLUP_CATEGORY_CD ='USD TOTAL'

AND NHB.DEPARTMENT_TYPE<> 'FINANCIAL DEPARTMENT'

AND NHB.BK_COMPANY_CD = '010'

AND BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  BETWEEN '50000' AND '59999'

AND NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT>=201302

GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
)C
,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_REPORT_LN_ITEM_PARAMETER PARM

WHERE PARM.INCLUSION_FLG='N'

AND PARM.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD='SUPPTMATLCOSTS'

AND DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD BETWEEN PARM.BK_ACCOUNT_RANGE_LOW_CD AND PARM.BK_ACCOUNT_RANGE_HIGH_CD
AND DD_BK_DEPT_CD  BETWEEN PARM.BK_DEPARTMENT_RANGE_LOW_CD AND PARM.BK_DEPARTMENT_RANGE_HIGH_CD
AND BK_COMPANY_CODE BETWEEN PARM.BK_COMPANY_RANGE_LOW_CD AND PARM.BK_COMPANY_RANGE_HIGH_CD
GROUP BY
PARM.BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD
,BK_COMPANY_CODE
,DD_BK_DEPT_CD
,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
) B
GROUP BY
BK_FINANCE_REPORT_LINE_ITEM_CD
,FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,BK_COMPANY_CODE
,DD_BK_DEPT_CD
HAVING SUM(USD_REV_NET) <> 0
) G
GROUP BY FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
)  COAAMT
ON FETCHAMT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=COAAMT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
INNER JOIN
(
SELECT M.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
TRIM(SUM(ZEROIFNULL(A.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT)-ZEROIFNULL(A.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT)))  SSC_WARRANTY_CREDIT_AMT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE A
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR M
ON (A.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT = M.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT )
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID  TACMC
ON  TACMC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = M.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY J
ON  (A.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT =J.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
AND A.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =J.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS_TV SOB
ON (A.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = SOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND SOB.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01')
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY F
ON ( A.BK_COMPANY_CODE=F.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
AND A.DD_BK_DEPT_CD=F.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE )
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT G
ON (A.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = G.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
AND G.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ='68106' )
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_ACCOUNT_SUB_ACCOUNT S
ON (A.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD||'-'||A.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD = S.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD||'-'||S.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD
AND  S.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD IN ('002','003')
AND S.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD='68106')
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT NFA
ON S.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
WHERE  (  A.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD  IN ( 'MO' , 'MC' )
OR (  A.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD =  'UO'
AND J.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_NAME =  'REVALUATION'
AND J.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME = 'REVALUATION'
AND SOB.PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG ='Y' )  )
GROUP BY M.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ) SWAMT
ON SWAMT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=COAAMT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
INNER JOIN
(
SELECT M.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
TRIM(SUM(ZEROIFNULL(A.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT)-ZEROIFNULL(A.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT)))  TAC_WARRANTY_CREDIT_AMT
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE A
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR M
ON (A.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT=M.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT )
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID  TACMC
ON  TACMC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = M.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY J
ON  (A.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT    =J.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
AND A.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY        =J.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS_TV SOB
ON (A.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = SOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND SOB.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01')
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PL_HIERARCHY F
ON ( A.BK_COMPANY_CODE=F.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
AND A.DD_BK_DEPT_CD=F.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE)
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT G
ON (A.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = G.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
AND G.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ='68106' )
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_ACCOUNT_SUB_ACCOUNT S
ON (A.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD||'-'||A.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD = S.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD||'-'||S.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD
AND  S.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD IN ('001','004')
AND S.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD='68106')
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT NFA
ON S.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = NFA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
WHERE  ( A.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD  IN ( 'MO' , 'MC' )
OR ( A.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD =  'UO'
AND J.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_NAME = 'REVALUATION'
AND J.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME = 'REVALUATION'
AND SOB.PUSH_TO_GLBL_CONSOL_BOOKS_FLG ='Y' ) )
GROUP BY M.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ) TWAMT
ON TWAMT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=SWAMT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
